name: codex-telegram-notifier
description: Send Codex completion notifications to Telegram through the Codex Telegram Notifier backend.

interface.shortDescription: Send Codex completion notifications to Telegram.
interface.longDescription: Registers a local Codex device with the Codex Telegram Notifier backend, preserves the existing Codex Desktop notifier, and sends signed Telegram notifications when Codex finishes a turn.
defaultPrompt: Use the Codex Telegram Notifier plugin when I need setup help, status checks, or manual notification tests.
